description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is made from polished wood, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a curved buttplate. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with visible iron sights mounted at the front and rear. The bolt handle is prominent on the right side, and the trigger guard is made of metal, enclosing a single trigger. The magazine is internal, with no detachable box visible, and the rifle has a simple, utilitarian design typical of mid-20th-century military firearms. The overall appearance is robust and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on durability.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock, long blued steel barrel, and iron sights. The design is robust, functional, and typical of mid-20th-century military rifles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, and long barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, bolt handle, and sight alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, barrel, and metallic components.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the trigger guard, magazine area, and barrel alignment.
